name: query
description: Run a read-only SQL query against the connected database and return rows as JSON. Query runs inside a READ ONLY transaction.

sql.description: SQL statement to execute; must be read-only (SELECT, WITH, EXPLAIN)

params.description: Positional bind parameters for the query

name: execute
description: Execute a write SQL statement (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DDL) inside a transaction and return the affected row count.

sql.description: SQL statement to execute; wrapped in a transaction

params.description: Positional bind parameters for the statement

name: list_tables
description: List the tables in a database schema. Returns name, estimated row count, and table kind (table, view, materialized view).

schema.description: Schema name to list (defaults to the search path)

name: describe_table
description: Return column names, data types, nullability, defaults, and primary-key membership for a single table.

name: list_indexes
description: List all indexes on a table including uniqueness, column order, and index method (btree, hash, gin).

table.description: Fully qualified table name to inspect

name: list_schemas
description: Return every schema visible to the current role along with its owner and a short comment when present.

name: insert_row
description: Insert a single row into a table using a JSON object of column names to values. Returns the inserted row including generated columns.

table.description: Fully qualified table name to insert into

row.description: Column name to value map for the new row

returning.description: Columns to return from the inserted row

name: update_rows
description: Update rows in a table matching a WHERE clause. The patch is applied to every matching row; returns the number of affected rows.

table.description: Fully qualified table name to update

where.description: SQL WHERE clause (without the WHERE keyword)

patch.description: Column name to new value map to apply

name: delete_rows
description: Delete rows from a table matching a WHERE clause. Returns the number of deleted rows. Wrapped in a transaction.

table.description: Fully qualified table name to delete from

where.description: SQL WHERE clause (without the WHERE keyword)

name: explain_query
description: Return the query planner's execution plan for a SQL statement, optionally with ANALYZE to include actual timings.

analyze.description: If true, run EXPLAIN ANALYZE for real timings

name: count_rows
description: Return an approximate row count for a table using the planner's statistics; falls back to COUNT(*) only when asked.

exact.description: If true, run COUNT(*) for an exact row count

name: create_index
description: Create an index on a table and one or more columns. Supports optional uniqueness and concurrent builds to avoid locking writes.

table.description: Fully qualified table name to index

columns.description: Ordered list of column names for the index

unique.description: If true, create a UNIQUE index

concurrent.description: If true, build the index without blocking writes

name: sample_rows
description: Return a small random sample of rows from a table for quick exploration. Uses TABLESAMPLE where supported.

table.description: Fully qualified table name to sample

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (1-1000)
